-Questi strumenti NON fanno il lavoro per lo studente - lo GUIDANO nel metodo maieutico.
+### Quando usare create_mindmap:
+- Lo studente dice "fammi una mappa", "crea uno schema", "organizza questo argomento"
+- Vuole vedere le connessioni tra concetti
+- Chiede di visualizzare un argomento
+
+### Quando usare create_quiz:
+- Lo studente dice "interrogami", "fammi delle domande", "voglio fare un test"
+- Vuole verificare cosa ha capito
+- Si sta preparando per una verifica
+
+**REGOLA IMPORTANTE PER I QUIZ:**
+Prima di creare un quiz, CHIEDI SEMPRE: "Preferisci fare il quiz per iscritto (lo vedi sullo schermo) oppure a voce (te lo faccio io)?"
+- Se ISCRITTO: usa create_quiz
+- Se VOCE: NON usare create_quiz! Fai tu le domande a voce, una alla volta, aspettando le risposte
+
+### Quando usare create_flashcards:
+- Lo studente dice "fammi delle flashcard", "devo memorizzare"
+- Vuole imparare vocaboli, date, formule, definizioni
+- Chiede aiuto per memorizzare
+
+### Quando usare open_student_summary (PREFERITO - metodo maieutico):
+- Lo studente dice "devo fare un riassunto", "devo scrivere un riassunto"
+- Vuole scrivere LUI STESSO il riassunto (compito, esercizio)
+- Apre l'editor vuoto, lo studente scrive, tu guidi con domande
+
+### Quando usare create_summary (solo se lo studente vuole che tu generi):
+- Lo studente dice "riassumimi TU", "fai TU una sintesi"
+- Ha bisogno di un ripasso veloce generato dall'AI
+- Vuole i punti chiave senza scrivere lui stesso
+
+### student_summary_add_comment:
+- Usa per dare feedback sul testo scritto dallo studente
+- Evidenzia parti specifiche e aggiungi commenti costruttivi
+
+### Quando usare create_diagram:
+- Lo studente chiede un flowchart, un diagramma di flusso
+- Vuole visualizzare un processo o algoritmo
+- Ha bisogno di vedere relazioni (ER diagram)
+
+### Quando usare create_timeline:
+- Lo studente studia storia e chiede una linea del tempo
+- Vuole ordinare eventi cronologicamente
+- Ha bisogno di visualizzare sequenze storiche
+
+### Quando usare create_demo:
+- Lo studente vuole vedere una simulazione interattiva
+- Dice "fammi vedere come funziona"
+- Chiede una demo visiva di un concetto
+
+NOTA: Quando crei uno strumento, ANNUNCIALO prima (es. "Ti preparo un quiz su questo argomento...") e poi invoca la funzione.

diff --git a/src/lib/stores/conversation-flow-store.ts b/src/lib/stores/conversation-flow-store.ts
index f222a19..95340d0 100644
--- a/src/lib/stores/conversation-flow-store.ts
+++ b/src/lib/stores/conversation-flow-store.ts
@@ -21,10 +21,138 @@ import {
   getCharacterSystemPrompt as _getCharacterSystemPrompt,
   type RoutingResult,
 } from '@/lib/ai/character-router';
-import { getDefaultSupportTeacher, getSupportTeacherById } from '@/data/support-teachers';
+import { getDefaultSupportTeacher, getSupportTeacherById, type CoachId } from '@/data/support-teachers';
 import { getBuddyForStudent } from '@/lib/ai/character-router';
 import { getBuddyById, type BuddyId } from '@/data/buddy-profiles';
 import { getMaestroById } from '@/data/maestri';
+import { logger } from '@/lib/logger';
+
+// ============================================================================
+// PERSISTENCE HELPERS
+// ============================================================================
+
+/**
+ * Create a new conversation in the database.
+ */
+async function createConversationInDB(
+  characterId: string,
+  characterType: CharacterType,
+  characterName: string
+): Promise<string | null> {
+  try {
+    const response = await fetch('/api/conversations', {
+      method: 'POST',
+      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
+      body: JSON.stringify({
+        maestroId: characterId,
+        title: `Conversazione con ${characterName}`,
+      }),
+    });
+    if (!response.ok) {
+      logger.error('Failed to create conversation', { status: response.status });
+      return null;
+    }
+    const data = await response.json();
+    logger.debug('Created conversation', { id: data.id, characterId });
+    return data.id;
+  } catch (error) {
+    logger.error('Error creating conversation', { error: String(error) });
+    return null;
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Save a message to the database.
+ */
+async function saveMessageToDB(
+  conversationId: string,
+  role: string,
+  content: string
+): Promise<void> {
+  try {
+    const response = await fetch(`/api/conversations/${conversationId}/messages`, {
+      method: 'POST',
+      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
+      body: JSON.stringify({ role, content }),
+    });
+    if (!response.ok) {
+      logger.error('Failed to save message', { status: response.status });
+    }
+  } catch (error) {
+    logger.error('Error saving message', { error: String(error) });
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Conversation summary from DB (used for context, not full message restoration).
+ */
+interface ConversationSummary {
+  id: string;
+  maestroId: string;
+  title: string;
+  summary: string | null;
+  keyFacts: string[] | null;
+  topics: string[];
+  messageCount: number;
+  lastMessageAt: string | null;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Load conversation summaries from the database (not full messages).
+ * We use summaries for context instead of restoring entire conversations.
+ */
+async function loadConversationSummariesFromDB(): Promise<ConversationSummary[]> {
+  try {
+    const response = await fetch('/api/conversations?limit=20&active=true');
+
+    // 401 = no user cookie yet (first visit), not an error
+    if (response.status === 401) {
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    if (!response.ok) {
+      logger.warn('Conversations API returned error', { status: response.status });
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    const data = await response.json();
+
+    // API might return error object instead of array
+    if (!Array.isArray(data)) {
+      if (data.error) {
+        logger.warn('Conversations API error', { error: data.error });
+      }
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    return data;
+  } catch (error) {
+    // Network error or JSON parse error

+          // Network error - mark as hydrated to avoid infinite loop

+      },

+- Ha bisogno di visualizzare sequenze storiche
 
-Quando lo studente dice "devo fare un riassunto", USA questi strumenti:
-- **open_student_summary**: Apre un editor VUOTO dove lo studente scrive. Tu guidi con domande.
-- **student_summary_add_comment**: Aggiungi feedback sul testo che LO STUDENTE ha scritto.
+### Quando usare create_demo:
+- Lo studente vuole vedere una simulazione interattiva
+- Dice "fammi vedere come funziona"
+- Chiede una demo visiva di un concetto
 
-Questi strumenti NON fanno il lavoro per lo studente - lo GUIDANO nel metodo maieutico.
+NOTA: Quando crei uno strumento, ANNUNCIALO prima (es. "Ti preparo un quiz su questo argomento...") e poi invoca la funzione.
 
 ## COSA DEVI FARE

+/**
+ * Create a new conversation in the database.
+ */
+async function createConversationInDB(
+  characterId: string,
+  characterType: CharacterType,
+  characterName: string
+): Promise<string | null> {
+  try {
+    const response = await fetch('/api/conversations', {
+      method: 'POST',
+      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
+      body: JSON.stringify({
+        maestroId: characterId,
+        title: `Conversazione con ${characterName}`,
+      }),
+    });
+    if (!response.ok) {
+      logger.error('Failed to create conversation', { status: response.status });
+      return null;
+    }
+    const data = await response.json();
+    logger.debug('Created conversation', { id: data.id, characterId });
+    return data.id;
+  } catch (error) {
+    logger.error('Error creating conversation', { error: String(error) });
+    return null;
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Save a message to the database.
+ */
+async function saveMessageToDB(
+  conversationId: string,
+  role: string,
+  content: string
+): Promise<void> {
+  try {
+    const response = await fetch(`/api/conversations/${conversationId}/messages`, {
+      method: 'POST',
+      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
+      body: JSON.stringify({ role, content }),
+    });
+    if (!response.ok) {
+      logger.error('Failed to save message', { status: response.status });
+    }
+  } catch (error) {
+    logger.error('Error saving message', { error: String(error) });
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Conversation summary from DB (used for context, not full message restoration).
+ */
+interface ConversationSummary {
+  id: string;
+  maestroId: string;
+  title: string;
+  summary: string | null;
+  keyFacts: string[] | null;
+  topics: string[];
+  messageCount: number;
+  lastMessageAt: string | null;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Load conversation summaries from the database (not full messages).
+ * We use summaries for context instead of restoring entire conversations.
+ */
+async function loadConversationSummariesFromDB(): Promise<ConversationSummary[]> {
+  try {
+    const response = await fetch('/api/conversations?limit=20&active=true');
+
+    // 401 = no user cookie yet (first visit), not an error
+    if (response.status === 401) {
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    if (!response.ok) {
+      logger.warn('Conversations API returned error', { status: response.status });
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    const data = await response.json();
+
+    // API might return error object instead of array
+    if (!Array.isArray(data)) {
+      if (data.error) {
+        logger.warn('Conversations API error', { error: data.error });
+      }
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    return data;
+  } catch (error) {
+    // Network error or JSON parse error
+    logger.warn('Error loading conversation summaries', { error: String(error) });
+    return [];
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Update conversation summary in DB.
+ * TODO: Call this when ending a conversation to save summary for future context.
+ */
+async function _updateConversationSummary(
+  conversationId: string,
+  summary: string,
+  keyFacts: string[],
+  topics: string[]
+): Promise<void> {
+  try {
+    await fetch(`/api/conversations/${conversationId}`, {
+      method: 'PUT',
+      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
+      body: JSON.stringify({ summary, keyFacts: JSON.stringify(keyFacts), topics }),
+    });
+  } catch (error) {
+    logger.error('Error updating conversation summary', { error: String(error) });
+  }
+}

content.thinking: Ora ho i diff di tutti i file. Lasciatemi sintetizzare cosa fanno le modifiche.

content.text:
Ecco il riassunto di tutte le modifiche non committate:

## Riassunto Modifiche

### 1. **Quiz Vocale vs Scritto** (`src/app/api/chat/route.ts`, `src/data/support-teachers.ts`)
- Aggiunta logica per chiedere allo studente se preferisce quiz scritto (UI) o vocale (l'AI fa le domande a voce)
- Se vocale: l'AI NON usa `create_quiz`, fa le domande direttamente in chat

### 2. **Hydration Onboarding da DB** (`src/app/page.tsx`, `src/lib/stores/onboarding-store.ts`)
- Aggiunto `hydrateFromApi()` per recuperare lo stato onboarding dal database
- Evita redirect a `/welcome` prima che l'hydration sia completata (fix race condition)

### 3. **Persistenza Conversazioni** (`src/lib/stores/conversation-flow-store.ts`, `src/components/conversation/character-chat-view.tsx`)
- Le conversazioni vengono salvate nel DB (create/addMessage)
- Caricamento summaries per contesto (non messaggi completi)
- `CharacterChatView` ora persiste i messaggi e carica conversazioni esistenti

### 4. **Tool Panel in CharacterChatView** (`src/components/conversation/character-chat-view.tsx`)
- Aggiunto supporto completo per ToolPanel (mindmap, quiz, flashcard, demo)
- Mapping da nomi funzione OpenAI (`create_mindmap`) a tipi tool (`mindmap`)
- Tool buttons per i coach

### 5. **Sessione Vocale + Tool Real-time** (`src/components/conversation/conversation-flow.tsx`, `voice-call-overlay.tsx`, `tool-panel.tsx`)
- `sessionId` passato al ToolPanel per SSE real-time
- `LiveMindmap` usato quando c'è una sessione vocale attiva (modifica mappe a voce)
- Transcript migliorato nel VoiceCallOverlay

### 6. **Audio Device Selector** (file nuovo + integrazione)
- Nuovo componente `audio-device-selector.tsx`: selettore microfono/speaker compatto
- Integrato in `VoiceCallOverlay` e `VoicePanel`

### 7. **DemoSandbox Semplificato** (`src/components/tools/demo-sandbox.tsx`)
- Rimossa validazione JS client-side (già fatta server-side in `demo-handler.ts`)
- Componente ora si fida dei dati pre-validati

### 8. **Tool Type Mapping** (`src/types/tools.ts`)
- Rinominato `topic` → `title` nel mindmap per consistenza

### 9. **Character Preferences Sync** (`src/lib/stores/app-store.ts`)
- `preferredCoach` e `preferredBuddy` ora sincronizzati con il server

### 10. **Providers: Load Conversation Summaries** (`src/components/providers.tsx`)
- Al mount, carica i summaries delle conversazioni per contesto futuro

---

**In sintesi**: è una feature che integra **persistenza conversazioni**, **quiz vocali**, **selezione dispositivi audio**, e **tool real-time con sessioni vocali**.

content.text:
Perfetto! Ho completato una esplorazione approfondita del codebase. Ecco il report completo su database, archivio materiali, tracking progressi e parent dashboard:

---

## ARCHITETTURA CONVERGIOEDUD - REPORT COMPLETO

### 1. SCHEMA DATABASE PRISMA

**File:** `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/prisma/schema.prisma` (797 linee)

#### A. Modelli per Conversazioni e Messaggi

**Conversation** (linee 207-239)
- Tabella principale per le sessioni di chat
- Campi: `id`, `userId`, `maestroId`, `title`, `summary`, `keyFacts`, `topics` (JSON), `messageCount`, `messages` (relazione)
- **Nuovo:** `isParentMode` (boolean) per chat genitori-insegnanti
- `studentId` (opzionale) per tracciare studente in modalità genitore
- Stato: `isActive`, `lastMessageAt`

**Message** (linee 241-257)
- Memorizza singoli messaggi delle conversazioni
- Relazione con `Conversation` (cascade delete)
- Campi: `role` (user/assistant), `content`, `toolCalls` (JSON), `tokenCount`
- Indicizzati su: `conversationId`, `createdAt`

#### B. Modelli per Diario/Progressi Studente

**StudySession** (linee 134-149)
- Traccia sessioni di studio per ogni maestro
- Campi: `userId`, `maestroId`, `subject`, `startedAt`, `endedAt`, `duration` (minuti), `xpEarned`, `questions`
- Indicizzati su: `userId`, `startedAt`

**Progress** (linee 108-132)
- Aggregati gamification per utente
- XP, livello, streak (attuale/massimo), `lastStudyDate`
- JSON: `achievements[]`, `masteries[]` (SubjectMastery per ogni materia)
- Metriche: `totalStudyMinutes`, `questionsAsked`, `sessionsThisWeek`

**Learning** (linee 263-287)
- **"Diario" di insights cross-sessione**
- Traccia osservazioni da ogni maestro
- Campi: `userId`, `maestroId`, `subject`, `category` (tipo di insight), `insight` (testo), `confidence` (0-1), `occurrences` (rinforzo)
- Indicizzati su: `userId`, `category`, `confidence`
- **Funzione:** rinforza insight simili aumentando confidence

**MethodProgress** (linee 417-439)
- Traccia autonomia dello studente nel metodo di studio (Issue #28)
- JSON: `mindMaps`, `flashcards`, `selfAssessment`, `helpBehavior`, `methodTransfer`
- JSON array: `events[]` (storico azioni)
- `autonomyScore` calcolato (0-1)

#### C. Modelli per Registro Genitori/Parent Insights

**StudentInsightProfile** (linee 294-330)
- **CENTRALE per parent dashboard** (Issue #31)
- `userId`, `studentName`, `visibleTo` (parents/teachers/both)
- **Consent tracking:** `parentConsent`, `studentConsent`, `consentDate`, `deletionRequested` (GDPR)
- JSON fields:
  - `insights[]` (MaestroInsight da ogni maestro)
  - `strengths[]` (punti di forza identificati)
  - `growthAreas[]` (aree di crescita)
  - `learningStyle` (canale preferito, durata ottimale, orario, motivatori)
  - `strategies[]` (consigli per il genitore)
- Metadati: `sessionCount`, `lastSessionId`, `confidenceScore`
- Relazione: `accessLogs[]` (audit trail GDPR)

**ProfileAccessLog** (linee 332-347)
- Audit trail per accessi al profilo
- Azioni: view, download, share, edit, delete_request
- IP, user agent, timestamp
- Conforme GDPR per tracciare chi ha visto cosa

#### D. Archiviazione Materiali/Tool

**Material** (linee 445-475)
- **Sistema di upsert con `toolId` univoco**

- Campi simili: `userId`, `type`, `title`, `topic`, `content` (JSON)

### 2. ARCHIVIO MATERIALI - ARCHITETTURA

**File chiave:** 
- `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/api/materials/route.ts` (API unificata)
- `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/api/tools/saved/route.ts` (API alternativa)
- `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/lib/tools/tool-persistence.ts` (libreria)

#### Sistema Doppio

1. **Material Table** (tramite `/api/materials`)
   - Upsert behavior: se `toolId` esiste, aggiorna; altrimenti crea
   - POST: controlla `existing = findUnique(toolId)`, poi update o create
   - Supporta: mindmap, quiz, flashcard, demo, webcam, pdf, search, diagram, timeline, summary, formula, chart
   - Fields: `title`, `content` (JSON.stringify), `preview`, `maestroId`, `sessionId`, `subject`
   - Sorting: `orderBy: createdAt desc`

2. **CreatedTool Table** (tramite `/api/tools/saved`)
   - Usa `saveTool()` da `tool-persistence.ts`
   - Crea nuovo record ogni volta (no upsert)
   - API CRUD completa: GET (con filtri), POST, PATCH (rate/bookmark/view), DELETE
   - Filter: `type`, `maestroId`, `isBookmarked`
   - Stats endpoint separato

#### Operazioni Supportate

**GET /api/materials**
```
Query params: userId, toolType, status (default: active), limit, offset
Response: { materials[], total, limit, offset }
```

**POST /api/materials**
```json
{
  "userId": "string",
  "toolId": "string",      // unique key per upsert
  "toolType": "mindmap|quiz|flashcard...",
  "title": "string",
  "content": { ... },      // auto-stringified
  "maestroId": "optional",
  "sessionId": "optional",
  "subject": "optional",
  "preview": "optional"
}
```

**GET /api/tools/saved**
```
Query: userId, type, maestroId, bookmarked, limit, offset, stats=true
```

**POST /api/tools/saved**
```json
{
  "userId": "string",
  "type": "ToolType",
  "title": "string",
  "topic": "optional",
  "content": {...},
  "maestroId": "optional",
  "conversationId": "optional",
  "sessionId": "optional"
}
```

---

### 3. SISTEMA DI SESSIONI - TRACKING PROGRESSI

#### A. Session Tracking

**StudySession Model** (Prisma)
- Creato: `POST /api/progress/sessions` con `maestroId`, `subject`
- Updato: `PATCH /api/progress/sessions` con `endedAt`, `duration`, `xpEarned`, `questions`
- GET: `/api/progress/sessions?limit=20&maestroId=optional`

#### B. Learning Insights

**Learning Model** (cross-session insights)
- API: `GET /api/learnings` e `POST /api/learnings`
- POST controlla duplicati: se `category + insight.substring(0,30)` esiste, reinforza (confidence += 0.1, occurrences++)
- Altrimenti crea nuovo learning
- GET supporta filtri: `category`, `maestroId`, `subject`, `minConfidence`

#### C. Progress Aggregation

**Progress Model**
- API: `GET /api/progress` e `PUT /api/progress`
- Campi aggiornabili: `xp`, `level`, `totalStudyMinutes`, `questionsAsked`, `sessionsThisWeek`
- Streak: `{current, longest, lastStudyDate}`
- JSON: `achievements[]`, `masteries[]`
- **Trigger notifiche:** level up, streak milestone, nuovi achievement

#### D. Session Evaluation

**SessionEvaluation** (type in `/src/types/index.ts`, linee 439-448)
```typescript
interface SessionEvaluation {
  score: 1-10
  feedback: string
  strengths: string[]
  areasToImprove: string[]
  sessionDuration: number (minutes)
  questionsAsked: number
  xpEarned: number
  savedToDiary: boolean
}
```

---

### 4. PARENT DASHBOARD / INSIGHTS

**File chiave:**
- `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/api/profile/generate/route.ts` (genera profilo)
- `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/api/profile/route.ts` (GET profilo)
- `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/app/api/parent-professor/route.ts` (chat genitori)
- `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/lib/profile/profile-generator.ts` (logica sintesi)

#### A. Generazione Profilo

**POST /api/profile/generate**
```
Body: { userId, forceRegenerate: boolean }

Flow:
1. Controlla se profilo esiste e <24h old (skip se forceRegenerate=false)
2. Raccoglie Learning entries per userId (orderBy confidence desc)
3. Converte a MaestroInsightInput[]
4. Chiama generateStudentProfile(userId, name, insights, sessionStats)
5. Upsert StudentInsightProfile con:
   - insights: JSON.stringify(insights)
   - strengths: JSON.parse(generatedProfile.strengths)
   - growthAreas: JSON.parse(generatedProfile.growthAreas)
   - strategies: JSON.parse(generatedProfile.strategies)
   - learningStyle: JSON.parse(generatedProfile.learningStyle)
   - sessionCount, confidenceScore
```

**Profile Generator Logic** (`src/lib/profile/profile-generator.ts`)
- Separa insights in strengths (confidence >= 0.7) e growthAreas (< 0.7)
- Generico strategie da STRATEGY_TEMPLATES per categoria
- Calcola learningStyle aggregando sessioni
- Confidence score = (quantity/maxInsights)*0.4 + (avgConfidence)*0.4 + (uniqueMaestri/5)*0.2

#### B. Lettura Profilo per Genitori

**GET /api/profile?userId=...**
```json
Response: {
  success: true,
  data: {
    studentId: "...",
    studentName: "...",
    lastUpdated: "date",
    strengths: [{
      id, maestroId, maestroName, category, observation, 
      isStrength, confidence, createdAt, sessionId
    }],
    growthAreas: [...],
    strategies: [{
      id, title, description, suggestedBy[], forAreas[], priority
    }],
    learningStyle: {
      preferredChannel: "visual|auditory|kinesthetic|reading_writing",
      optimalSessionDuration: number,
      preferredTimeOfDay: "morning|afternoon|evening",
      motivators: string[],
      challengePreference: "step_by_step|big_picture|mixed"
    },
    totalSessions: number,
    totalMinutes: number,
    maestriInteracted: string[]
  },
  meta: {
    confidenceScore: number,
    lastUpdated: date,
    sessionCount: number
  }
}
```

**Controlli:**
- Richiede `parentConsent === true`
- Loga accesso in ProfileAccessLog (action: "view")

#### C. Chat Genitori-Insegnanti

**POST /api/parent-professor**
```json
Body: {
  maestroId: string,
  studentId: string,
  studentName: string,
  message: string,
  conversationId: "optional",
  maestroSystemPrompt: string,
  maestroDisplayName: string
}

Process:
1. Filtra messaggio con filterInput() (safety)
2. Recupera Learning entries per studentId + maestroId
3. Genera parent-mode prompt (generateParentModePrompt)
4. Crea/continua Conversation con isParentMode=true
5. Salva messages (user + assistant)
6. Chiama chatCompletion (no tools in parent mode)
7. Sanitizza output
```

**Conversation Model per genitori**
```prisma
isParentMode: boolean    // true = conversazione genitore
studentId: string        // studente discusso
```

#### D. Consent & GDPR

**POST /api/profile/consent**
- Registra `parentConsent`, `studentConsent` con `consentDate`
- Crea ProfileAccessLog con action: "edit"

**DELETE /api/profile/consent?userId=...&immediate=true**
- Immediato: cancella StudentInsightProfile + ProfileAccessLog
- Standard (no immediate): marca `deletionRequested`, cancella in 30 giorni

**GET /api/profile/consent**
- Ritorna stato consent

#### E. Export Profilo

**GET /api/profile/export?userId=...&format=json|pdf**
- JSON: struttura completa per portabilità
- HTML: per stampa/PDF
- Loga azione "download"
- Richiede parentConsent

---

### 5. TIPI COMPLETI

**File:** `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/types/index.ts`

#### Tool Types
```typescript
type ToolType = 'mindmap' | 'quiz' | 'flashcard' | 'demo' | 'search' | 
                'diagram' | 'timeline' | 'summary' | 'formula' | 'chart' | 
                'webcam' | 'pdf' | 'homework'
```

#### Parent Dashboard Types
```typescript
type ObservationCategory = 
  | 'logical_reasoning' | 'creativity' | 'verbal_expression' | 'study_method'
  | 'critical_thinking' | 'artistic_sensitivity' | 'scientific_curiosity'
  | 'spatial_memory' | 'historical_understanding' | 'mathematical_intuition'
  | 'linguistic_ability' | 'philosophical_depth' | 'physical_awareness'
  | 'experimental_approach' | 'environmental_awareness' | 'collaborative_spirit'
  | 'narrative_skill'

interface MaestroObservation {
  id, maestroId, maestroName, category, observation, 
  isStrength, confidence (0-1), createdAt, sessionId
}

interface StudentInsights {
  studentId, studentName, lastUpdated,
  strengths: MaestroObservation[],
  growthAreas: MaestroObservation[],
  strategies: LearningStrategy[],
  learningStyle: LearningStyleProfile,
  totalSessions, totalMinutes, maestriInteracted[]
}
```

---

### 6. FLUSSO COMPLETO ESEMPIO

**Scenario:** Studente Luca studia matematica con Archimede, genitori vogliono update

1. **Sessione Studio:**
   - POST `/api/progress/sessions` → crea StudySession
   - Chat con Archimede
   - PATCH `/api/progress/sessions` → end session, duration=45min, xpEarned=50, questions=8

2. **Insights Generati:**
   - POST `/api/learnings` → "Luca ha capito bene le frazioni" (category: logical_reasoning, confidence: 0.8)
   - POST `/api/learnings` → "Fatica con l'algebra astratta" (category: mathematical_intuition, confidence: 0.5)

3. **Materiali Salvati:**
   - POST `/api/materials` → Quiz su frazioni (toolId: quiz-001, toolType: quiz)
   - POST `/api/tools/saved` → Mindmap su equazioni lineari

4. **Generazione Profilo:**
   - POST `/api/profile/generate?userId=luca-id`
   - Aggrega tutti Learning entries
   - Crea StudentInsightProfile con strengths/growthAreas/strategies

5. **Genitore Accede:**
   - Consenso: POST `/api/profile/consent?userId=luca-id&parentConsent=true`
   - GET `/api/profile?userId=luca-id` → vede insights
   - Chat: POST `/api/parent-professor` → chiede a Archimede se Luca può fare esami

---

### 7. NOTE ARCHITETTURALI IMPORTANTI

1. **Doppio Sistema Materiali:** Material (upsert) vs CreatedTool (CRUD) - potrebbero essere consolidati
2. **JSON Storage:** Molti campi JSON (achievements, strategies, learningStyle) - richiede parsing/stringify
3. **Consent per Privacy:** StudentInsightProfile non visibile senza `parentConsent=true`
4. **Audit Trail:** ProfileAccessLog traccia ogni accesso per GDPR
5. **Confidence Scoring:** Learning entries hanno confidence (0-1) per pesare insights
6. **No Cache:** Profilo rigenrato ogni 24h se richiesto, o on-demand con forceRegenerate
7. **Parent Mode Special:** Chat genitori non usa tools, include student learning context
8. **Streak & Gamification:** Progress gestisce XP, level, achievement notifications

Ho completato un'esplorazione **molto thorough** del codebase. Tutti i 4 punti richiesti sono documentati con file path, linee di codice, e architettura dettagliata.

- `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/lib/profile/profile-generator.ts` (logica sintesi)

#### A. Generazione Profilo

**POST /api/profile/generate**
```
Body: { userId, forceRegenerate: boolean }

Flow:
1. Controlla se profilo esiste e <24h old (skip se forceRegenerate=false)
2. Raccoglie Learning entries per userId (orderBy confidence desc)
3. Converte a MaestroInsightInput[]
4. Chiama generateStudentProfile(userId, name, insights, sessionStats)
5. Upsert StudentInsightProfile con:
   - insights: JSON.stringify(insights)
   - strengths: JSON.parse(generatedProfile.strengths)
   - growthAreas: JSON.parse(generatedProfile.growthAreas)
   - strategies: JSON.parse(generatedProfile.strategies)
   - learningStyle: JSON.parse(generatedProfile.learningStyle)
   - sessionCount, confidenceScore
```

**Profile Generator Logic** (`src/lib/profile/profile-generator.ts`)
- Separa insights in strengths (confidence >= 0.7) e growthAreas (< 0.7)
- Generico strategie da STRATEGY_TEMPLATES per categoria
- Calcola learningStyle aggregando sessioni
- Confidence score = (quantity/maxInsights)*0.4 + (avgConfidence)*0.4 + (uniqueMaestri/5)*0.2

#### B. Lettura Profilo per Genitori

**GET /api/profile?userId=...**
```json
Response: {
  success: true,
  data: {
    studentId: "...",
    studentName: "...",
    lastUpdated: "date",
    strengths: [{
      id, maestroId, maestroName, category, observation, 
      isStrength, confidence, createdAt, sessionId
    }],
    growthAreas: [...],
    strategies: [{
      id, title, description, suggestedBy[], forAreas[], priority
    }],
    learningStyle: {
      preferredChannel: "visual|auditory|kinesthetic|reading_writing",
      optimalSessionDuration: number,
      preferredTimeOfDay: "morning|afternoon|evening",
      motivators: string[],
      challengePreference: "step_by_step|big_picture|mixed"
    },
    totalSessions: number,
    totalMinutes: number,
    maestriInteracted: string[]
  },
  meta: {
    confidenceScore: number,
    lastUpdated: date,
    sessionCount: number
  }
}
```

**Controlli:**
- Richiede `parentConsent === true`
- Loga accesso in ProfileAccessLog (action: "view")

#### C. Chat Genitori-Insegnanti

**POST /api/parent-professor**
```json
Body: {
  maestroId: string,
  studentId: string,
  studentName: string,
  message: string,
  conversationId: "optional",
  maestroSystemPrompt: string,
  maestroDisplayName: string
}

Process:
1. Filtra messaggio con filterInput() (safety)
2. Recupera Learning entries per studentId + maestroId
3. Genera parent-mode prompt (generateParentModePrompt)
4. Crea/continua Conversation con isParentMode=true
5. Salva messages (user + assistant)
6. Chiama chatCompletion (no tools in parent mode)
7. Sanitizza output
```

**Conversation Model per genitori**
```prisma
isParentMode: boolean    // true = conversazione genitore
studentId: string        // studente discusso
```

#### D. Consent & GDPR

**POST /api/profile/consent**
- Registra `parentConsent`, `studentConsent` con `consentDate`
- Crea ProfileAccessLog con action: "edit"

**DELETE /api/profile/consent?userId=...&immediate=true**
- Immediato: cancella StudentInsightProfile + ProfileAccessLog
- Standard (no immediate): marca `deletionRequested`, cancella in 30 giorni

**GET /api/profile/consent**
- Ritorna stato consent

#### E. Export Profilo

**GET /api/profile/export?userId=...&format=json|pdf**
- JSON: struttura completa per portabilità
- HTML: per stampa/PDF
- Loga azione "download"
- Richiede parentConsent

---

### 5. TIPI COMPLETI

**File:** `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/types/index.ts`

#### Tool Types
```typescript
type ToolType = 'mindmap' | 'quiz' | 'flashcard' | 'demo' | 'search' | 
                'diagram' | 'timeline' | 'summary' | 'formula' | 'chart' | 
                'webcam' | 'pdf' | 'homework'
```

#### Parent Dashboard Types
```typescript
type ObservationCategory = 
  | 'logical_reasoning' | 'creativity' | 'verbal_expression' | 'study_method'
  | 'critical_thinking' | 'artistic_sensitivity' | 'scientific_curiosity'
  | 'spatial_memory' | 'historical_understanding' | 'mathematical_intuition'
  | 'linguistic_ability' | 'philosophical_depth' | 'physical_awareness'
  | 'experimental_approach' | 'environmental_awareness' | 'collaborative_spirit'
  | 'narrative_skill'

interface MaestroObservation {
  id, maestroId, maestroName, category, observation, 
  isStrength, confidence (0-1), createdAt, sessionId
}

interface StudentInsights {
  studentId, studentName, lastUpdated,
  strengths: MaestroObservation[],
  growthAreas: MaestroObservation[],
  strategies: LearningStrategy[],
  learningStyle: LearningStyleProfile,
  totalSessions, totalMinutes, maestriInteracted[]
}
```

---

### 6. FLUSSO COMPLETO ESEMPIO

**Scenario:** Studente Luca studia matematica con Archimede, genitori vogliono update

1. **Sessione Studio:**
   - POST `/api/progress/sessions` → crea StudySession
   - Chat con Archimede
   - PATCH `/api/progress/sessions` → end session, duration=45min, xpEarned=50, questions=8

2. **Insights Generati:**
   - POST `/api/learnings` → "Luca ha capito bene le frazioni" (category: logical_reasoning, confidence: 0.8)
   - POST `/api/learnings` → "Fatica con l'algebra astratta" (category: mathematical_intuition, confidence: 0.5)

3. **Materiali Salvati:**
   - POST `/api/materials` → Quiz su frazioni (toolId: quiz-001, toolType: quiz)
   - POST `/api/tools/saved` → Mindmap su equazioni lineari

4. **Generazione Profilo:**
   - POST `/api/profile/generate?userId=luca-id`
   - Aggrega tutti Learning entries
   - Crea StudentInsightProfile con strengths/growthAreas/strategies

5. **Genitore Accede:**
   - Consenso: POST `/api/profile/consent?userId=luca-id&parentConsent=true`
   - GET `/api/profile?userId=luca-id` → vede insights
   - Chat: POST `/api/parent-professor` → chiede a Archimede se Luca può fare esami

---

### 7. NOTE ARCHITETTURALI IMPORTANTI

1. **Doppio Sistema Materiali:** Material (upsert) vs CreatedTool (CRUD) - potrebbero essere consolidati
2. **JSON Storage:** Molti campi JSON (achievements, strategies, learningStyle) - richiede parsing/stringify
3. **Consent per Privacy:** StudentInsightProfile non visibile senza `parentConsent=true`
4. **Audit Trail:** ProfileAccessLog traccia ogni accesso per GDPR
5. **Confidence Scoring:** Learning entries hanno confidence (0-1) per pesare insights
6. **No Cache:** Profilo rigenrato ogni 24h se richiesto, o on-demand con forceRegenerate
7. **Parent Mode Special:** Chat genitori non usa tools, include student learning context
8. **Streak & Gamification:** Progress gestisce XP, level, achievement notifications

Ho completato un'esplorazione **molto thorough** del codebase. Tutti i 4 punti richiesti sono documentati con file path, linee di codice, e architettura dettagliata.

questions.question: Per i riassunti delle conversazioni: quando deve essere generato il riassunto? Alla chiusura esplicita della chat o dopo un timeout di inattività?

options.label: Chiusura esplicita
options.description: Quando l'utente clicca un pulsante 'Termina conversazione' o cambia maestro

options.label: Timeout inattività
options.description: Dopo X minuti senza messaggi, genera riassunto automaticamente

options.label: Entrambi
options.description: Sia alla chiusura che dopo timeout (es. 15 min inattività)

options.description: Una sola tabella 'Material' con tutti i tipi di contenuto - più semplice da gestire

options.label: Separare per origine
options.description: Material per upload manuali, CreatedTool per tool AI-generated - più semantico

options.description: Lo studente dice 'come ti senti su questo argomento?' (1-5 stelle)

options.description: Il maestro valuta la comprensione basandosi sulla conversazione

options.description: Sia auto-valutazione che valutazione AI, utile per confronto

options.label: Sempre
options.description: Ogni sessione genera una breve nota, anche se 'tutto nella norma'

input.prompt:
## Contesto

ConvergioEdu è una piattaforma educativa con AI "Maestri" (coach, buddy, professori). Devo progettare un sistema per:

### Requisiti Confermati

1. **Riassunti Conversazioni**
   - Trigger: ENTRAMBI (chiusura esplicita + timeout 15min inattività)
   - Salvare riassunto in `Conversation.summary`
   - All'avvio nuova conversazione con stesso agente: caricare ultimo riassunto
   - Saluto contestuale tipo "Ciao Marco! L'ultima volta avevamo parlato di X... come è andata la verifica?"

2. **Archivio Tool Unificato**
   - Consolidare `Material` e `CreatedTool` in UNA sola tabella (`Material`)
   - Migrare dati da CreatedTool a Material
   - Deprecare/rimuovere CreatedTool

3. **Voto Sessioni**
   - ENTRAMBI: auto-valutazione studente + valutazione maestro AI
   - Salvare in `StudySession` (aggiungere campi)

4. **Diario/Progressi**
   - `StudySession` deve tracciare: voto, durata, argomenti, tool utilizzati (con link)
   - Aggiungere relazione `StudySession` -> `Material[]`

5. **Note Genitori**
   - SEMPRE generare una nota dopo ogni sessione
   - Salvare in `Learning` o nuovo modello per registro genitori

### Codebase Esistente

**Schema Prisma** (`prisma/schema.prisma`):
- `Conversation`: id, userId, maestroId, summary, keyFacts, topics[], messages[]
- `Message`: id, conversationId, role, content, toolCalls
- `StudySession`: id, userId, maestroId, subject, startedAt, endedAt, duration, xpEarned, questions
- `Material`: id, userId, toolId, toolType, content, title, maestroId, sessionId, subject, status, userRating, isBookmarked
- `CreatedTool`: id, userId, type, title, content, maestroId, conversationId, sessionId, userRating, isBookmarked
- `Learning`: id, userId, maestroId, subject, category, insight, confidence, occurrences
- `StudentInsightProfile`: insights, strengths, growthAreas, strategies

**API Routes**:
- `/api/conversations` - CRUD conversazioni
- `/api/conversations/[id]/messages` - messaggi
- `/api/materials` - GET/POST materiali (upsert con toolId)
- `/api/tools/saved` - GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE CreatedTool
- `/api/progress/sessions` - traccia sessioni
- `/api/learnings` - insights cross-sessione

**Store**:
- `conversation-flow-store.ts`: gestisce conversazioni, ha `conversationsByCharacter`
- `app-store.ts`: useConversationStore per persistenza

**Componenti Chat**:
- `conversation-flow.tsx`: chat principale maestri
- `character-chat-view.tsx`: chat coach/buddy

### Output Richiesto

Progetta un piano dettagliato che copra:

1. **Modifiche Schema Prisma** - nuovi campi/relazioni
2. **Nuove API Routes** - endpoints necessari
3. **Logica Riassunto** - quando/come generare, formato
4. **Migrazione CreatedTool → Material** - script/strategia
5. **Modifiche Frontend** - store, componenti
6. **Saluto Contestuale** - come iniettare nel system prompt
7. **Note Genitori Automatiche** - trigger, contenuto

Considera:
- Retrocompatibilità
- Performance (riassunto asincrono?)
- ISE Engineering Fundamentals (test, clean code)

input.content:
# Piano: Sistema Riassunti Conversazioni + Archivio Unificato

**Data**: 2026-01-01
**Branch**: `feature/conversation-summaries-unified-archive`
**Issue**: N/A (enhancement)

---

## Obiettivi

1. **Riassunti Conversazioni** - Generare riassunto a fine sessione (chiusura + timeout 15min)
2. **Saluto Contestuale** - All'avvio, caricare ultimo riassunto e salutare contestualmente
3. **Archivio Unificato** - Consolidare `Material` + `CreatedTool` in una sola tabella
4. **Voto Sessioni** - Auto-valutazione studente + valutazione AI maestro
5. **Diario Sessioni** - Tracciare argomenti, tool usati (con link), durata
6. **Note Genitori** - Generare SEMPRE una nota dopo ogni sessione

---

## Pre-Requisiti

```bash
# Creare worktree separato
git worktree add ../ConvergioEdu-summaries feature/conversation-summaries-unified-archive -b feature/conversation-summaries-unified-archive
cd ../ConvergioEdu-summaries
npm install
```

---

## Fase 1: Schema Prisma

### 1.1 Modifiche a `StudySession`

```prisma
model StudySession {
  // ... existing fields ...

  // NEW: Ratings
  studentRating    Int?      // 1-5 auto-valutazione
  studentFeedback  String?   // Commento opzionale studente
  maestroScore     Int?      // 1-10 valutazione AI
  maestroFeedback  String?   // Feedback AI
  strengths        String?   // JSON array
  areasToImprove   String?   // JSON array

  // NEW: Topics & Context
  topics           String    @default("[]") // JSON array argomenti
  conversationId   String?   // Link a Conversation

  // NEW: Tools relation
  materials        Material[]
}
```

### 1.2 Modifiche a `Material`

```prisma
model Material {
  // ... existing fields ...

  // NEW: Session relation
  sessionId   String?
  session     StudySession? @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id])

  // NEW: From CreatedTool migration
  topic          String?
  conversationId String?

  @@index([sessionId])
}
```

### 1.3 Nuovo modello `ParentNote`

```prisma
model ParentNote {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId      String
  sessionId   String
  maestroId   String
  subject     String
  duration    Int

  summary     String    // Riassunto per genitori
  highlights  String    // JSON array achievements
  concerns    String?   // JSON array (può essere vuoto)
  suggestions String?   // JSON array consigli

  generatedAt DateTime  @default(now())
  viewedAt    DateTime?

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}
```

**File**: `prisma/schema.prisma`

---

## Fase 2: Migrazione CreatedTool → Material

### 2.1 Script migrazione

**File**: `scripts/migrate-created-tools.ts`

```typescript
// 1. Leggere tutti i CreatedTool
// 2. Per ognuno, creare Material con toolId = `migrated-${createdTool.id}`
// 3. Verificare migrazione
// 4. NON cancellare CreatedTool (buffer 30 giorni)
```

### 2.2 API Updates

- `src/app/api/tools/saved/route.ts` → redirect a `/api/materials`
- `src/lib/tools/tool-persistence.ts` → deprecare, usare Prisma diretto

---

## Fase 3: Sistema Riassunti

### 3.1 Inactivity Monitor

**File**: `src/lib/conversation/inactivity-monitor.ts`

- Timer per ogni conversazione attiva
- Reset ad ogni messaggio
- Dopo 15min → trigger `endConversationWithSummary()`

### 3.2 Summary Generator

**File**: `src/lib/conversation/summary-generator.ts`

Funzione `generateAndSaveConversationSummary()`:
1. Fetch messaggi conversazione
2. Usare `src/lib/ai/summarize.ts` esistente
3. Salvare in `Conversation.summary`, `keyFacts`, `topics`
4. Salvare learnings in `Learning` table
5. Marcare conversazione `isActive: false`

### 3.3 API Endpoint

**File**: `src/app/api/conversations/[id]/end/route.ts`

POST → chiude conversazione, genera riassunto + valutazione + nota genitori

---

## Fase 4: Saluto Contestuale

### 4.1 Greeting Generator

**File**: `src/lib/conversation/contextual-greeting.ts`

```typescript
async function generateContextualGreeting({
  studentName,
  maestroName,
  previousSummary,
  previousTopics,
  lastSessionDate
}): Promise<string>
```

Prompt LLM che genera saluto tipo:
> "Ciao Marco! L'ultima volta avevamo parlato delle frazioni equivalenti. Com'è andata la verifica di matematica?"

### 4.2 Store Integration

**File**: `src/lib/stores/conversation-flow-store.ts`

In `switchToCharacter()`:
1. Caricare ultima conversazione per characterId
2. Se ha summary → generare saluto contestuale
3. Usare come primo messaggio invece del greeting default

---

## Fase 5: Sistema Valutazioni

### 5.1 Modal Auto-valutazione

**File**: `src/components/session/session-rating-modal.tsx`

- 5 stelle + commento opzionale
- Mostrato quando sessione finisce

### 5.2 Valutazione AI Maestro

**File**: `src/lib/session/maestro-evaluation.ts`

```typescript
async function generateMaestroEvaluation(messages, studentProfile): Promise<{
  score: number,      // 1-10
  feedback: string,
  strengths: string[],
  areasToImprove: string[]
}>
```

### 5.3 Update Session API

**File**: `src/app/api/progress/sessions/route.ts`

Estendere PATCH per salvare:
- `studentRating`, `studentFeedback`
- `maestroScore`, `maestroFeedback`, `strengths`, `areasToImprove`
- `topics`, `conversationId`

---

## Fase 6: Note Genitori

### 6.1 Generator

**File**: `src/lib/session/parent-note-generator.ts`

```typescript
async function generateParentNote(session, summary, evaluation): Promise<{
  summary: string,
  highlights: string[],
  concerns: string[],
  suggestions: string[]
}>
```

### 6.2 API

**File**: `src/app/api/parent-notes/route.ts`

- GET: Lista note per userId (figli del genitore)
- POST: Crea nota (chiamato internamente da end session)

### 6.3 Dashboard Integration

**File**: `src/components/parent/parent-dashboard.tsx`

Aggiungere sezione "Note Recenti" con lista note sessioni.

---

## Fase 7: Frontend Integration

### 7.1 Conversation Flow

**File**: `src/components/conversation/conversation-flow.tsx`

- Aggiungere bottone "Termina Sessione"
- Integrare inactivity monitor
- Mostrare rating modal a fine sessione

### 7.2 Character Chat View

**File**: `src/components/conversation/character-chat-view.tsx`

- Stesso trattamento per coach/buddy

### 7.3 Store Updates

**File**: `src/lib/stores/conversation-flow-store.ts`

Nuove actions:
- `endConversationWithSummary()`
- `loadLastConversationSummary(characterId)`

---

## File Critici da Modificare

| File | Modifiche |
|------|-----------|
| `prisma/schema.prisma` | StudySession, Material, ParentNote |
| `src/lib/stores/conversation-flow-store.ts` | Summary triggers, greeting loading |
| `src/lib/ai/summarize.ts` | Già esiste, da usare |
| `src/lib/tools/tool-persistence.ts` | Deprecare |
| `src/app/api/progress/sessions/route.ts` | Estendere PATCH |
| `src/components/conversation/conversation-flow.tsx` | End session flow |

---

## Nuovi File da Creare

| File | Scopo |
|------|-------|
| `src/lib/conversation/inactivity-monitor.ts` | Timer 15min |
| `src/lib/conversation/summary-generator.ts` | Genera e salva riassunti |
| `src/lib/conversation/contextual-greeting.ts` | Saluti contestuali |
| `src/lib/session/maestro-evaluation.ts` | Valutazione AI |
| `src/lib/session/parent-note-generator.ts` | Note genitori |
| `src/components/session/session-rating-modal.tsx` | UI auto-valutazione |
| `src/app/api/conversations/[id]/end/route.ts` | Endpoint chiusura |
| `src/app/api/parent-notes/route.ts` | API note genitori |
| `scripts/migrate-created-tools.ts` | Migrazione DB |

---

## Ordine Esecuzione

1. **Setup** - Worktree + branch
2. **Schema** - Prisma migrations
3. **Migrazione** - CreatedTool → Material
4. **Summary System** - Generator + triggers
5. **Greeting** - Contestuale all'avvio
6. **Ratings** - Studente + AI
7. **Parent Notes** - Automatiche
8. **Integration** - Frontend + test
9. **Cleanup** - Deprecare tool-persistence

---

## Test Plan

- [ ] Unit: Summary generation
- [ ] Unit: Greeting generation
- [ ] Unit: Rating calculation
- [ ] Integration: Session end flow completo
- [ ] Integration: Inactivity timeout
- [ ] E2E: Ciclo vita sessione completo

5. **Greeting** - Contestuale all'avvio
6. **Ratings** - Studente + AI
7. **Parent Notes** - Automatiche
8. **Integration** - Frontend + test
9. **Cleanup** - Deprecare tool-persistence

---

- [ ] Unit: Summary generation
- [ ] Unit: Greeting generation
- [ ] Unit: Rating calculation
- [ ] Integration: Session end flow completo
- [ ] Integration: Inactivity timeout
- [ ] E2E: Ciclo vita sessione completo

# On-Demand Documentation System

Claude Code loads this documentation on-demand to reduce context usage.

## Usage

Reference files with `@docs/claude/filename.md` in conversation.

## Available Documentation

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `mirrorbuddy.md` | Triangle of Support, Coach/Buddy system, character routing |
| `voice-api.md` | Azure Realtime API, models, session config, debug |
| `tools.md` | Tool execution, mindmap/quiz/flashcard creation |
| `notifications.md` | Server-side notifications, PWA push |
| `parent-dashboard.md` | GDPR consent, parent-professor chat |
| `pomodoro.md` | Timer phases, XP rewards |
| `onboarding.md` | Voice onboarding with Melissa |
| `ambient-audio.md` | Procedural audio, presets, Pomodoro integration |

## Context Optimization (Jan 2026)

Changes made to reduce context from 132k to ~50k tokens at session start:

| Optimization | Savings |
|--------------|---------|
| Consolidated 6 rules → 1 | ~10k tokens |
| Archived 52 agents (kept 9) | ~4k tokens |
| Disabled pr-review-toolkit plugin | ~1k tokens |
| Archived 3 unused skills | ~1k tokens |
| Slimmed CLAUDE.md (833 → 157 lines) | ~7k tokens |

## Manual Compact

Auto-compact triggers at 95% (not configurable). Use `/compact` proactively at ~85% for better performance.

## Per-Project Settings

`.claude/settings.json` can override:
- `enabledPlugins` - Enable/disable plugins
- `permissions` - Tool permissions
- `hooks` - Custom automation

# Knowledge Base & Documentation Optimization Plan

**Date**: 2026-01-01
**Status**: In Progress

---

## Objectives

1. **Optimize app-knowledge-base.ts** - Lazy retrieval instead of full injection
2. **Create ARCHITECTURE.md** - Complete feature inventory
3. **Update app-release-manager** - ConvergioEdu-specific checks

---

## Phase 1: Discovery (Parallel)

- [ ] Inventory all features from codebase
- [ ] Collect all ADRs summaries
- [ ] Map component structure
- [ ] Identify all AI integrations

## Phase 2: Optimize Knowledge Base

- [ ] Create feature index for quick lookup
- [ ] Implement lazy retrieval function
- [ ] Reduce prompt size from ~4k to ~500 tokens base
- [ ] Test with coach integration

## Phase 3: Create ARCHITECTURE.md

- [ ] Document all 17 Maestri
- [ ] Document Triangle of Support (Coach/Buddy)
- [ ] Document all tools (flashcards, mindmaps, quizzes, demos)
- [ ] Document gamification (XP, streaks, Pomodoro)
- [ ] Document accessibility (7 profiles)
- [ ] Document audio (voice API, ambient audio)
- [ ] Document GDPR/parent dashboard
- [ ] Document state management (Zustand + REST)
- [ ] Document AI providers (Azure/Ollama)

## Phase 4: Update Release Manager

- [ ] Add WCAG 2.1 AA checks
- [ ] Add GDPR compliance for minors
- [ ] Add AI safety guardrails validation
- [ ] Add E2E educational flows
- [ ] Add voice API integration tests

## Phase 5: Verification

- [ ] Run lint + typecheck
- [ ] Test knowledge base retrieval
- [ ] Verify documentation accuracy

---

## Checkpoints

| Phase | Status |
|-------|--------|
| Discovery | ✅ |
| Knowledge Base | ✅ |
| Architecture Doc | ✅ |
| Release Manager | ✅ |
| Verification | ✅ |

---

## Completed Changes

### 1. app-knowledge-base-v2.ts (NEW)
- Compact index (~200 tokens vs ~4k tokens)

# Database

## Key Models

- **User** → Profile, Settings, Progress (1:1)
- **StudySession** - Learning with XP
- **FlashcardProgress** - FSRS state
- **Conversation** → Messages
- **Learning** - Cross-session insights
- **Notification** - Server persistence

## Data Persistence

| Data Type | Storage |
|-----------|---------|
| User settings | `/api/user/settings` |
| Progress | `/api/progress` |
| Materials | `/api/materials` |
| Conversations | `/api/conversations` |
| Session ID | `sessionStorage` |
| Device cache | `localStorage` (OK) |

## Commands

```bash
npx prisma generate  # Generate client
npx prisma db push   # Sync schema
npx prisma studio    # GUI browser
```

content.content:
1→# Tool Execution System
     2→
     3→Maestri can create interactive educational tools during conversations.
     4→
     5→## Available Tools
     6→
     7→| Tool | Function Name | Purpose |
     8→|------|---------------|---------|
     9→| Mind Map | `create_mindmap` | Visual concept organization (MarkMap) |
    10→| Quiz | `create_quiz` | Multiple choice assessment |
    11→| Flashcards | `create_flashcards` | FSRS-compatible spaced repetition |
    12→| Demo | `create_demo` | Interactive HTML/JS simulations |
    13→| Search | `web_search` | Educational web/YouTube search |
    14→| Student Summary | `open_student_summary` | Student writes summary with maieutic guidance |
    15→| Summary (AI) | `create_summary` | AI-generated summary (legacy) |
    16→
    17→## Architecture
    18→
    19→| Layer | File | Purpose |
    20→|-------|------|---------|
    21→| Types | `src/types/tools.ts` | Unified types + `CHAT_TOOL_DEFINITIONS` |
    22→| Executor | `src/lib/tools/tool-executor.ts` | Handler registry |
    23→| Handlers | `src/lib/tools/handlers/*.ts` | Tool-specific logic |
    24→| Events | `src/lib/realtime/tool-events.ts` | SSE broadcasting |
    25→| Storage | `src/lib/storage/materials-db.ts` | IndexedDB materials |
    26→
    27→## Adding a New Tool
    28→
    29→1. Add type to `src/types/tools.ts`
    30→2. Add function definition to `CHAT_TOOL_DEFINITIONS`
    31→3. Create handler in `src/lib/tools/handlers/`
    32→4. Import handler in `handlers/index.ts`
    33→
    34→## Security
    35→
    36→- **Demo Sandbox**: JS validated against `DANGEROUS_JS_PATTERNS`
    37→- **HTML Sanitization**: Script tags removed
    38→- **Iframe Isolation**: `sandbox="allow-scripts"`
    39→
    40→## Voice Commands for Mindmaps (ADR-0011)
    41→
    42→| Command | Function | Example |
    43→|---------|----------|---------|
    44→| `mindmap_add_node` | Add child | "Aggiungi Roma sotto Italia" |
    45→| `mindmap_connect_nodes` | Link nodes | "Collega storia con geografia" |
    46→| `mindmap_expand_node` | Add children | "Espandi Liguria" |
    47→| `mindmap_delete_node` | Remove | "Cancella il nodo" |
    48→| `mindmap_focus_node` | Center view | "Zoom su Roma" |
    49→| `mindmap_set_color` | Change color | "Colora Roma di rosso" |
    50→
    51→## Voice Commands for Student Summary (#70)
    52→
    53→Maieutic method: Student writes, Maestro guides with questions.
    54→
    55→| Command | Function | When to Use |
    56→|---------|----------|-------------|
    57→| `open_student_summary` | Open editor | "Devo fare un riassunto" |
    58→| `student_summary_add_comment` | Add inline feedback | Highlight and comment on student text |
    59→
    60→### Maieutic Guidance
    61→
    62→The Maestro should:
    63→1. Ask guiding questions, not write the content
    64→2. Use inline comments to highlight areas for improvement
    65→3. Encourage the student to express their understanding
    66→
    67→Example prompts:
    68→- "Di cosa parla questo argomento?"
    69→- "Quali sono i punti chiave?"
    70→- "Cosa è importante ricordare?"
    71→

file.content:
# Tool Execution System

Maestri can create interactive educational tools during conversations.

## Available Tools

| Tool | Function Name | Purpose |
|------|---------------|---------|
| Mind Map | `create_mindmap` | Visual concept organization (MarkMap) |
| Quiz | `create_quiz` | Multiple choice assessment |
| Flashcards | `create_flashcards` | FSRS-compatible spaced repetition |
| Demo | `create_demo` | Interactive HTML/JS simulations |
| Search | `web_search` | Educational web/YouTube search |
| Student Summary | `open_student_summary` | Student writes summary with maieutic guidance |
| Summary (AI) | `create_summary` | AI-generated summary (legacy) |

## Architecture

| Layer | File | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| Types | `src/types/tools.ts` | Unified types + `CHAT_TOOL_DEFINITIONS` |
| Executor | `src/lib/tools/tool-executor.ts` | Handler registry |
| Handlers | `src/lib/tools/handlers/*.ts` | Tool-specific logic |
| Events | `src/lib/realtime/tool-events.ts` | SSE broadcasting |
| Storage | `src/lib/storage/materials-db.ts` | IndexedDB materials |

## Adding a New Tool

1. Add type to `src/types/tools.ts`
2. Add function definition to `CHAT_TOOL_DEFINITIONS`
3. Create handler in `src/lib/tools/handlers/`
4. Import handler in `handlers/index.ts`

## Security

- **Demo Sandbox**: JS validated against `DANGEROUS_JS_PATTERNS`
- **HTML Sanitization**: Script tags removed
- **Iframe Isolation**: `sandbox="allow-scripts"`

## Voice Commands for Mindmaps (ADR-0011)

| Command | Function | Example |
|---------|----------|---------|
| `mindmap_add_node` | Add child | "Aggiungi Roma sotto Italia" |
| `mindmap_connect_nodes` | Link nodes | "Collega storia con geografia" |
| `mindmap_expand_node` | Add children | "Espandi Liguria" |
| `mindmap_delete_node` | Remove | "Cancella il nodo" |
| `mindmap_focus_node` | Center view | "Zoom su Roma" |
| `mindmap_set_color` | Change color | "Colora Roma di rosso" |

## Voice Commands for Student Summary (#70)

Maieutic method: Student writes, Maestro guides with questions.

| Command | Function | When to Use |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| `open_student_summary` | Open editor | "Devo fare un riassunto" |
| `student_summary_add_comment` | Add inline feedback | Highlight and comment on student text |

### Maieutic Guidance

The Maestro should:
1. Ask guiding questions, not write the content
2. Use inline comments to highlight areas for improvement
3. Encourage the student to express their understanding

Example prompts:
- "Di cosa parla questo argomento?"
- "Quali sono i punti chiave?"
- "Cosa è importante ricordare?"

Trusted Adult"] 550→ 551→ Input --> L1 552→ L1 --> L2 553→ L2 --> L3 554→ L3 --> L4 555→ L4 --> L5 556→ L5 --> Crisis 557→ 558→ Crisis -->|No| Output 559→ Crisis -->|Yes| Escalate 560→``` 561→ 562→### 14-18, 18+) | 571→| `monitoring.ts` | Safety event logging, session termination | 572→ 573→**Location**: `src/lib/safety/` 574→ 575→### Crisis Response 576→ 577→- Crisis keywords trigger escalation to trusted adult 578→- Session can be auto-terminated for safety 579→- All safety events logged for review 580→ 581→--- 582→ 583→## Key ADRs 584→ 585→| ADR | Title | Decision | 586→|-----|-------|----------| 587→| 0001 | Materials Storage | Provider-agnostic (local/Azure Blob) | 588→| 0002 | Mind Maps | MarkMap instead of Mermaid | 589→| 0003 | Triangle of Support | 3 character types (Maestro/Coach/Buddy) | 590→| 0004 | Safety Guardrails | 5-layer defense for child protection | 591→| 0005 | Real-time Tools | SSE for streaming tool creation | 592→| 0006 | Telemetry | Prometheus-compatible metrics | 593→| 0007 | Notifications | Server-side persistence | 594→| 0008 | Parent Dashboard | Dual GDPR consent model | 595→| 0009 | Tool Execution | OpenAI function calling | 596→| 0010 | Conversations | Separate history per character | 597→| 0011 | Voice Mindmaps | Real-time voice editing | 598→| 0012 | Unified Voice | Side-by-side chat/voice layout | 599→| 0013 | Platform Support | Coach handles tech support | 600→| 0014 | PWA Push | Browser notifications via VAPID | 601→| 0015 | Database-First | No localStorage, API-synced | 602→| 0016 | Modularization | Barrel exports, max 300 lines | 603→| 0017 | Voice Summaries | Voice-driven summary creation | 604→| 0018 | Audio Coordination | Pause ambient during voice | 605→ 606→**Location**: `docs/adr/` 607→ 627→|---------|------| 628→| Types | `src/types/index.ts` | 629→| AI Providers | `src/lib/ai/providers.ts` | 630→| Safety | `src/lib/safety/` | 631→| FSRS | `src/lib/education/fsrs.ts` | 632→| Maestri | `src/data/maestri/` | 633→| Coaches | `src/data/support-teachers.ts` | 634→| Buddies | `src/data/buddy-profiles.ts` | 635→| Stores | `src/lib/stores/` | 636→| API | `src/app/api/` | 637→ 638→--- **Maestri**: 17 subject experts 647→- **Coaches**: 5 learning coaches 648→- **Buddies**: 5 peer buddies 649→- **Accessibility Profiles**: 7 profiles 650→- **Audio Modes**: 14 modes 651→- **Audio Presets**: 7 presets 652→- **Safety Layers**: 5 layers 653→- **ADRs**: 18 architecture decisions 654→ Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. # ConvergioEdu Architecture > AI-powered educational platform for students with learning differences. > Last updated: 2026-01-01 --- ## Table of Contents 1. [Overview](#overview) 2. [Core Concepts](#core-concepts) 3. [Character System](#character-system) 4. [Educational Tools](#educational-tools) 5. [Gamification](#gamification) 6. [Accessibility](#accessibility) 7. [Audio System](#audio-system) 8. [State Management](#state-management) 9. [Database Schema](#database-schema) 10. [API Routes](#api-routes) 11. [Safety & Guardrails](#safety--guardrails) 12. [Key ADRs](#key-adrs) --- ## System Overview ```mermaid flowchart TB subgraph Client["Client (Next.js 14)"] UI[React Components] Stores[Zustand Stores] Audio[Web Audio API] end subgraph Server["Server (API Routes)"] API[REST API] SSE[SSE Streaming] Voice[Realtime API Proxy] end subgraph AI["AI Layer"] Azure[Azure OpenAI] Ollama[Ollama Fallback] Safety[Safety Guardrails] end subgraph Data["Data Layer"] Prisma[(Prisma ORM)] DB[(SQLite/PostgreSQL)] end UI --> Stores Stores --> API UI --> Audio UI --> Voice API --> Safety SSE --> Safety Safety --> Azure Safety --> Ollama API --> Prisma Prisma --> DB Voice --> Azure ``` ## Overview ConvergioEdu is a Next.js 14 application providing AI tutoring for K-12 students with learning differences (dyslexia, ADHD, autism, etc.). ### Tech Stack | Layer | Technology | |-------|------------| | Frontend | Next.js 14, React 18, TypeScript | | Styling | Tailwind CSS, Radix UI | | State | Zustand (no persist, API-synced) | | Database | Prisma + SQLite (dev) / PostgreSQL (prod) | | AI | Azure OpenAI (primary), Ollama (fallback) | | Voice | Azure Realtime API (WebRTC) | | Audio | Web Audio API (procedural generation) | ### Directory Structure ``` src/ ├── app/ # Next.js App Router │ ├── api/ # REST API routes │ └── (pages)/ # Page components ├── components/ # React components ├── data/ # Static data (maestri, coaches, buddies) ├── lib/ │ ├── ai/ # AI providers, intent detection, routing │ ├── audio/ # Ambient audio generators │ ├── education/ # FSRS, quiz logic │ ├── safety/ # Safety guardrails │ ├── stores/ # Zustand stores │ └── tools/ # Tool handlers └── types/ # TypeScript definitions ``` --- ## Core Concepts ### Triangle of Support (ADR-0003) Three character types serve different educational needs: ```mermaid flowchart TD Student((Student)) subgraph Triangle["Triangle of Support"] Maestro["🎓 MAESTRO (17)
Subject Expert
Vertical • Content"] Coach["📚 COACH (5)
Learning Method
Vertical • Autonomy"] Buddy["🤝 BUDDY (5)
Peer Support
Horizontal • Emotional"] end Student --> |academic| Maestro Student --> |methodology| Coach Student --> |emotional| Buddy Maestro -.-> |handoff| Coach Coach -.-> |handoff| Buddy Buddy -.-> |handoff| Maestro ``` ### Intent-Based Routing ```mermaid flowchart LR Input[/"Student Message"/] Intent{Intent
Detection} Input --> Intent Intent --> |academic| M[Maestro] Intent --> |methodology| C[Coach] Intent --> |emotional| B[Buddy] Intent --> |tech_support| C M --> |"Explain X"| Darwin[Darwin] M --> |"Math help"| Euclide[Euclide] C --> |"How to study"| Melissa[Melissa] B --> |"I'm frustrated"| Mario[Mario] ``` --- ## Character System ### 17 Maestri (Subject Experts) | Maestro | Subject | Voice | |---------|---------|-------| | Euclide | Mathematics | coral | | Marie Curie | Chemistry | shimmer | | Richard Feynman | Physics | echo | | Galileo Galilei | Astronomy | verse | | Charles Darwin | Biology/Sciences | ballad | | Alessandro Manzoni | Italian Literature | sage | | William Shakespeare | English | ash | | Erodoto | History | ballad | | Alexander von Humboldt | Geography | echo | | Leonardo da Vinci | Art | coral | | Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart | Music | verse | | Ada Lovelace | Computer Science | shimmer | | Adam Smith | Economics | echo | | Socrate | Philosophy | sage | | Marco Tullio Cicerone | Civic Education | ash | | Ippocrate | Physical Education/Health | coral | | Chris | Storytelling | alloy | **Location**: `src/data/maestri/` ### 5 Learning Coaches | Coach | Personality | Voice | Best For | |-------|-------------|-------|----------| | Melissa | Enthusiastic, young (27) | shimmer | Default, energetic students | | Roberto | Calm, reassuring (28) | echo | Anxious students | | Chiara | Organized, academic (24) | coral | Structure-seekers | | Andrea | Sporty, energetic (26) | sage | ADHD, movement needs | | Favij | Gaming, digital (29) | ballad | Tech-savvy students | **Location**: `src/data/support-teachers.ts` ### 5 Peer Buddies (MirrorBuddy v2.0) | Buddy | Personality | Voice | |-------|-------------|-------| | Mario | Friendly, ironic | echo | | Noemi | Empathetic, warm | shimmer | | Enea | Playful, cheerful | alloy | | Bruno | Thoughtful, introspective | sage | | Sofia | Creative, artistic | coral | **MirrorBuddy Feature**: Buddies dynamically mirror the student's learning differences (dyslexia, ADHD, autism, etc.) so students feel understood. **Location**: `src/data/buddy-profiles.ts` --- ## Educational Tools ### Tool Types | Tool | Handler | Description | |------|---------|-------------| | Flashcard | `flashcard-handler.ts` | FSRS-5 spaced repetition | | Quiz | `quiz-handler.ts` | Multiple choice with feedback | | MindMap | `mindmap-handler.ts` | MarkMap visualization | | Summary | `summary-handler.ts` | AI-generated summaries | | Demo | `demo-handler.ts` | Interactive simulations | | Diagram | `diagram-handler.ts` | Mermaid diagrams | | Timeline | `timeline-handler.ts` | Historical timelines | **Location**: `src/lib/tools/handlers/` ### FSRS Algorithm (ADR-0001) Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler v5 implementation: ```typescript // Core parameters FSRS_INITIAL_STABILITY = 1.0 // days FSRS_INITIAL_DIFFICULTY = 0.3 FSRS_DESIRED_RETENTION = 0.9 // 90% target FSRS_K_FACTOR = 19.0 // stability growth // Quality ratings 1 = Forgot (0.3x stability) 2 = Hard (0.6x stability) 3 = Good (0.85x stability) 4 = Easy (1.3x stability) ``` **Location**: `src/lib/education/fsrs.ts` ### Tool Execution (ADR-0009) ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant S as Student participant M as Maestro AI participant T as Tool Handler participant SSE as SSE Stream participant DB as Database S->>M: "Fammi una mappa su Roma" M->>M: Function Call: create_mindmap M->>T: Execute mindmap-handler T->>SSE: Stream chunks SSE-->>S: Real-time render T->>DB: Save material T->>M: Tool result M->>S: "Ecco la mappa!" ``` --- ## Gamification ### XP & Leveling System ```typescript // XP Sources Lesson completed: 10-50 XP Flashcard reviewed: 5 XP per card Quiz completed: 10-30 XP (based on score) Pomodoro completed: 15 XP // 10 Levels 1. Principiante 0 XP 2. Apprendista 100 XP 3. Studente 300 XP 4. Studioso 600 XP 5. Esperto 1000 XP 6. Professore 1500 XP 7. Gran Professore 2200 XP 8. Saggio 3000 XP 9. Illuminato 4000 XP 10. Leggenda 5000 XP ``` ### Streaks & Achievements - **Daily Streak**: Study every day, milestone at 7/30/100/365 days - **Achievements**: Categories include study, mastery, streak, social, exploration, xp - **Subject Mastery**: 5 tiers from Beginner to Master **Location**: `src/lib/stores/app-store.ts` (useProgressStore) ### Pomodoro Timer - 25 min focus + 5 min break (configurable) - Every 4 pomodoros: 15 min long break - 15 XP per completed pomodoro - Integrates with ambient audio (ADR-0018) **Location**: `src/lib/stores/pomodoro-store.ts` --- ## Accessibility ### 7 Accessibility Profiles | Profile | Key Adaptations | |---------|-----------------| | Dyslexia | OpenDyslexic font, letter/line spacing | | ADHD | Distraction-free, Pomodoro, break reminders | | Visual | High contrast, large text, TTS | | Motor | Keyboard navigation, reduced motion | | Autism | Reduced motion, sensory-friendly | | Auditory | Visual cues, large text emphasis | | Cerebral Palsy | Keyboard nav, TTS, large text | ### Accessibility Features - **Font**: OpenDyslexic toggle - **Text Size**: 0.8x - 1.5x multiplier - **Line Spacing**: 1.0 - 2.0 - **Letter Spacing**: Adjustable - **Contrast**: High contrast mode - **Motion**: Reduced animations - **TTS**: Auto-read with speed control (0.5x - 2.0x) - **Colors**: Custom background/text **Location**: `src/lib/accessibility/` --- ## Audio System ### Voice API (Azure Realtime) Real-time voice chat with all characters: ```typescript // Voice configuration voices: ['alloy', 'ash', 'ballad', 'coral', 'echo', 'sage', 'shimmer', 'verse'] VAD sensitivity: 0.3 - 0.7 Silence duration: 300 - 800ms Barge-in: Interrupt while speaking ``` **Features**: - Real-time transcription - Tool execution during voice - Audio level monitoring - HTTPS required **Location**: `src/app/api/realtime/` ### Ambient Audio (ADR-0018) Procedural audio generation via Web Audio API: ```typescript // 9 Audio Modes white_noise, pink_noise, brown_noise, binaural_alpha (8-14 Hz), binaural_beta (14-30 Hz), binaural_theta (4-8 Hz), rain, thunderstorm, fireplace, cafe, library, forest, ocean, night // 7 Presets deep_work: binaural_beta + brown_noise library: library + white_noise starbucks: café ambience rainy_day: rain + fireplace + thunder nature: forest + ocean focus: binaural_alpha creative: binaural_theta + forest ``` **Pomodoro Integration**: - Auto-start with Pomodoro - Pause during breaks - Auto-duck during voice/TTS **Location**: `src/lib/audio/`, `src/lib/stores/ambient-audio-store.ts` --- ## State Management ### Zustand Stores (ADR-0015) **No localStorage** - All state synced via REST APIs: ```mermaid flowchart LR subgraph Client["Zustand Stores"] Settings[useSettingsStore] Progress[useProgressStore] Voice[useVoiceSessionStore] Conv[useConversationStore] Pomo[usePomodoroStore] Audio[useAmbientAudioStore] Notif[useNotificationStore] end subgraph API["REST API"] A1["/api/user/settings"] A2["/api/progress"] A3["/api/conversations"] A4["/api/notifications"] end Settings --> A1 Progress --> A2 Conv --> A3 Notif --> A4 Pomo --> A2 Voice -.-> |in-memory| Voice Audio -.-> |in-memory| Audio ``` | Store | Purpose | Sync Endpoint | |-------|---------|---------------| | useSettingsStore | Theme, AI provider, profile | `/api/user/settings`, `/api/user/profile` | | useProgressStore | XP, levels, streaks | `/api/progress` | | useVoiceSessionStore | Voice connection state | In-memory only | | useConversationStore | Chat history | `/api/conversations` | | usePomodoroStore | Timer state | `/api/progress` (on complete) | | useAmbientAudioStore | Audio playback | In-memory only | | useNotificationStore | Notifications | `/api/notifications` | **Sync Pattern**: ```typescript // Optimistic updates with batched sync store.update(state) → UI updates immediately store.syncToServer() → Batched API call (fire-and-forget) store.loadFromServer() → Hydrate on app start ``` --- ## Database Schema ### Core Models (Prisma) ```mermaid erDiagram User ||--|| Profile : has User ||--|| Settings : has User ||--|| AccessibilitySettings : has User ||--|| Progress : has User ||--o{ Conversation : has User ||--o{ FlashcardProgress : has User ||--o{ QuizResult : has User ||--o{ Material : has User ||--o{ StudySession : has User ||--o{ Notification : has User ||--|| StudentInsightProfile : has User ||--|| StudySchedule : has Conversation ||--o{ Message : contains StudentInsightProfile ||--o{ ProfileAccessLog : tracks StudySchedule ||--o{ ScheduledSession : has StudySchedule ||--o{ CustomReminder : has User { string id PK datetime createdAt datetime updatedAt } Progress { int xp int level int streakDays json achievements } FlashcardProgress { float difficulty float stability datetime nextReview } Conversation { string maestroId string title datetime updatedAt } ``` ### Key Indexes - `FlashcardProgress`: `nextReview`, `userId` (due cards lookup) - `Conversation`: `userId`, `maestroId`, `updatedAt` (list views) - `Message`, `QuizResult`, `TelemetryEvent`: `userId`, `createdAt` (sorting) **Location**: `prisma/schema.prisma` --- ## API Routes ### Categories | Category | Routes | Description | |----------|--------|-------------| | User | `/api/user/*` | Settings, profile, data export | | Progress | `/api/progress/*` | XP, sessions, autonomy | | Flashcards | `/api/flashcards/*` | FSRS state sync | | Conversations | `/api/conversations/*` | Chat history, messages | | Tools | `/api/tools/*` | Tool creation, SSE streaming | | Voice | `/api/realtime/*` | Token, status | | Notifications | `/api/notifications/*`, `/api/push/*` | In-app, PWA push | | Parent | `/api/parent-professor/*` | Dashboard, GDPR consent | | Telemetry | `/api/telemetry/*` | Usage analytics | ### Auth Pattern Cookie-based session via `convergio-user-id`: ```typescript const userId = cookieStore.get('convergio-user-id')?.value; if (!userId) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 }); ``` --- ## Safety & Guardrails ### 5-Layer Defense System (ADR-0004) ```mermaid flowchart TB Input[/"Student Input"/] subgraph Safety["5-Layer Defense"] L1["🛡️ Layer 1: System Prompt
Safety rules injected"] L2["🚫 Layer 2: Input Filter
Block inappropriate"] L3["🔍 Layer 3: Jailbreak Detector
Catch manipulation"] L4["🤖 Layer 4: AI Processing
Generate response"] L5["✨ Layer 5: Output Sanitizer
Clean response"] end Crisis{Crisis
Detected?} Output[/"Safe Response"/] Escalate["⚠️ Escalate to
Trusted Adult"] Input --> L1 L1 --> L2 L2 --> L3 L3 --> L4 L4 --> L5 L5 --> Crisis Crisis -->|No| Output Crisis -->|Yes| Escalate ``` ### Safety Modules | Module | Purpose | |--------|---------| | `safety-prompts.ts` | Core injection, crisis keywords | | `content-filter.ts` | Input filtering, blocked patterns | | `output-sanitizer.ts` | Output cleaning, streaming sanitizer | | `jailbreak-detector.ts` | Manipulation attempt detection | | `age-gating.ts` | Age-appropriate content (6-10, 11-13, 14-18, 18+) | | `monitoring.ts` | Safety event logging, session termination | **Location**: `src/lib/safety/` ### Crisis Response - Crisis keywords trigger escalation to trusted adult - Session can be auto-terminated for safety - All safety events logged for review --- ## Key ADRs | ADR | Title | Decision | |-----|-------|----------| | 0001 | Materials Storage | Provider-agnostic (local/Azure Blob) | | 0002 | Mind Maps | MarkMap instead of Mermaid | | 0003 | Triangle of Support | 3 character types (Maestro/Coach/Buddy) | | 0004 | Safety Guardrails | 5-layer defense for child protection | | 0005 | Real-time Tools | SSE for streaming tool creation | | 0006 | Telemetry | Prometheus-compatible metrics | | 0007 | Notifications | Server-side persistence | | 0008 | Parent Dashboard | Dual GDPR consent model | | 0009 | Tool Execution | OpenAI function calling | | 0010 | Conversations | Separate history per character | | 0011 | Voice Mindmaps | Real-time voice editing | | 0012 | Unified Voice | Side-by-side chat/voice layout | | 0013 | Platform Support | Coach handles tech support | | 0014 | PWA Push | Browser notifications via VAPID | | 0015 | Database-First | No localStorage, API-synced | | 0016 | Modularization | Barrel exports, max 300 lines | | 0017 | Voice Summaries | Voice-driven summary creation | | 0018 | Audio Coordination | Pause ambient during voice | **Location**: `docs/adr/` --- ## Quick Reference ### Commands ```bash npm run dev # Dev server :3000 npm run build # Production build npm run lint # ESLint npm run typecheck # TypeScript npm run test # Playwright E2E npx prisma generate # After schema changes npx prisma db push # Sync schema ``` ### Key Paths | Purpose | Path | |---------|------| | Types | `src/types/index.ts` | | AI Providers | `src/lib/ai/providers.ts` | | Safety | `src/lib/safety/` | | FSRS | `src/lib/education/fsrs.ts` | | Maestri | `src/data/maestri/` | | Coaches | `src/data/support-teachers.ts` | | Buddies | `src/data/buddy-profiles.ts` | | Stores | `src/lib/stores/` | | API | `src/app/api/` | --- ## Statistics - **Components**: 100+ React components - **API Routes**: 50+ REST endpoints - **Zustand Stores**: 8 stores - **Prisma Models**: 20+ models - **Maestri**: 17 subject experts - **Coaches**: 5 learning coaches - **Buddies**: 5 peer buddies - **Accessibility Profiles**: 7 profiles - **Audio Modes**: 14 modes - **Audio Presets**: 7 presets - **Safety Layers**: 5 layers - **ADRs**: 18 architecture decisions
